## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] HTML
- [ ] CSS
- [ ] JavaScript
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository configuration

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the change in a browser when it affects the interface.
- [ ] I included screenshots for visual updates.
- [ ] I kept repository-facing text in English.
- [ ] I avoided committing generated archives, local scratch files, dependency folders, and private references.

## Notes

Add any review notes, risks, constraints, or follow-up work.
